# Code of Conduct

This project follows the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/) v2.1.

Report conduct concerns privately through the maintainer contact methods listed on the [@yowainwright GitHub profile](https://github.com/yowainwright). Do not open public issues for conduct reports.

Use [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/yowainwright/pre/security/advisories/new) only for security vulnerabilities.
